data.title: RED: Add failing tests for Rails and Jekyll detection to detect-stack.sh
data.description:
## Description

Modify `tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh` (existing, 10 tests) to add 5 new failing test blocks for Rails and Jekyll detection.

### Test Specifications

Each test creates a fixture dir, runs detect-stack.sh, asserts on stdout:

1. `test_detect_stack_rails_project` — Gemfile (non-empty) + config/routes.rb → asserts "ruby-rails"
2. `test_detect_stack_jekyll_project` — Gemfile (non-empty) + _config.yml → asserts "ruby-jekyll"
3. `test_detect_stack_rails_jekyll_precedence` — Gemfile + config/routes.rb + _config.yml → asserts "ruby-rails" (more specific marker wins)
4. `test_detect_stack_rails_no_gemfile` — config/routes.rb WITHOUT Gemfile → asserts "unknown" (Gemfile is the gate)
5. `test_detect_stack_jekyll_no_gemfile` — _config.yml WITHOUT Gemfile → asserts "unknown"

All 5 tests FAIL (RED) because detect-stack.sh currently returns "unknown" for these directories.

### File Impact
- MODIFY: `tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh
- [ ] 5 new test blocks added (rails/jekyll)
  Verify: grep -c "test_detect_stack_rails\|test_detect_stack_jekyll" tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] New tests fail (RED) — at least one FAIL line
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] Existing tests still pass — existing test count unchanged
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-detect-stack.sh 2>&1 | grep -c "PASS" | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
